evidence.summary: Fixture entrypoint intentionally declares a missing reference.

skipped_checks.reason: This fixture isolates only missing declared reference behavior.
skipped_checks.impact: Other static defects are covered by sibling bad_static fixtures.

residual_risk: The fixture must be refreshed if declared-reference validation rules change.
claim_boundary: This contract covers only the missing-reference bad static fixture. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
